title: [FIRRTL][circt-reduce] module-port-pruner crash
body:
I observed a crash in the module-port-pruner on the following input:

```
firrtl.circuit "Foo" {
  firrtl.module private @Bar(
    in %a: !firrtl.uint<65>,
    out %b: !firrtl.probe<uint<65>>,
    out %c: !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<65>>
  ) {
    %wire = firrtl.wire sym @sym : !firrtl.uint<65>
    %0 = firrtl.ref.send %a : !firrtl.uint<65>
    firrtl.ref.define %b, %0 : !firrtl.probe<uint<65>>
     %1 = firrtl.ref.rwprobe <@Bar::@sym> : !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<65>>
    firrtl.ref.define %c, %1 : !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<65>>
  }
  firrtl.extmodule @Foo()
}
```

This then crashes with:

```
# circt-reduce Foo.mlir -o /dev/null -include module-port-pruner --test /usr/bin/env --test-arg sh --test-arg '-c' --test-arg 'true'
Reading input
Testing input with `/usr/bin/env`
  with argument `sh`
  with argument `-c`
  with argument `true`
Initial module has size 490
Trying reduction `module-port-pruner`
loc("Foo.mlir":8:10): error: 'firrtl.ref.send' op operation destroyed but still has uses
LLVM ERROR: operation destroyed but still has uses
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: circt-reduce Foo.mlir -o /dev/null -include module-port-pruner --test /usr/bin/env --test-arg sh --test-arg -c --test-arg true
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
0  circt-reduce             0x00000001045c3f68 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) + 56
1  circt-reduce             0x00000001045c1e50 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() + 172
2  circt-reduce             0x00000001045c4a10 SignalHandler(int, __siginfo*, void*) + 300
3  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x000000019fb5d6a4 _sigtramp + 56
4  libsystem_pthread.dylib  0x000000019fb23848 pthread_kill + 296
5  libsystem_c.dylib        0x000000019fa2c9e4 abort + 124
6  circt-reduce             0x0000000104586b7c llvm::report_fatal_error(llvm::Twine const&, bool) + 436
7  circt-reduce             0x00000001045869c8 llvm::report_fatal_error(llvm::Twine const&, bool) + 0
8  circt-reduce             0x00000001055c4e28 mlir::Operation::~Operation() + 528
9  circt-reduce             0x00000001055c5970 llvm::ilist_traits<mlir::Operation>::deleteNode(mlir::Operation*) + 88
10 circt-reduce             0x0000000105563d14 llvm::iplist_impl<llvm::simple_ilist<mlir::Operation>, llvm::ilist_traits<mlir::Operation>>::erase(llvm::ilist_iterator<llvm::ilist_detail::node_options<mlir::Operation, true, false, void, false, void>, false, false>) + 108
11 circt-reduce             0x0000000105532f04 (anonymous namespace)::ModulePortPruner::rewrite(circt::firrtl::FModuleOp) + 492
12 circt-reduce             0x000000010454f0e4 execute(mlir::MLIRContext&) + 3988
13 circt-reduce             0x000000010454dec4 main + 308
14 dyld                     0x000000019f782b98 start + 6076
zsh: abort      circt-reduce Foo.mlir -o /dev/null -include module-port-pruner --test   sh  
```

  firrtl.module private @Bar(
    in %a: !firrtl.uint<65>,

     %1 = firrtl.ref.rwprobe <@Bar::@sym> : !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<65>>
    firrtl.ref.define %c, %1 : !firrtl.rwprobe<uint<65>>

  firrtl.extmodule @Foo()
